allow: Bash(node -e "const fs=require\(''fs''\); const d=JSON.parse\(fs.readFileSync\(''ne_admin1.geojson'',''utf8''\)\); console.log\(''Admin1:'', d.features.length, ''features''\); const d2=JSON.parse\(fs.readFileSync\(''ne_populated_places.geojson'',''utf8''\)\); console.log\(''Places:'', d2.features.length, ''features''\)")

Bash(node -e "const fs=require\(''fs''\); const d=JSON.parse\(fs.readFileSync\(''ne_admin1.geojson'',''utf8''\)\); console.log\(''Admin1:'', d.features.length, ''features''\); console.log\(''Sample keys:'', Object.keys\(d.features[0].properties\).join\('', ''\)\)")
Bash(sqlite3 "C:/Users/Wismut/AppData/Roaming/com.wismut.guess-map/guessmap.db" "SELECT region_level, COUNT\(*\) FROM region GROUP BY region_level; SELECT COUNT\(*\) as total FROM region;")

Bash(node -e "const d=JSON.parse\(require\(''fs''\).readFileSync\(''ne_countries.geojson'',''utf8''\)\); console.log\(''Countries:'', d.features.length\); const withIso = d.features.filter\(f => f.properties.ISO_A2 && f.properties.ISO_A2 !== ''-99'' && f.properties.ISO_A2 !== ''-1''\); console.log\(''With ISO_A2:'', withIso.length\); const withEither = d.features.filter\(f => { const a2 = f.properties.ISO_A2; const eh = f.properties.ISO_A2_EH; return \(a2 && a2 !== ''-99'' && a2 !== ''-1''\) || \(eh && eh !== ''-99'' && eh !== ''-1''\); }\); console.log\(''With any ISO:'', withEither.length\)")
